name: JNU – Faculty
qualification: Any Masters Degree, M.A, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MS, M.Phil/Ph.D

basic_details.job_title: JNU Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Professor, Associate and Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: JNU Recruitment 2026 aims to fill vacancies for Professor, Associate and Assistant Professor posts. Eligible candidates with M.Sc, M.A, M.E/ M.Tech, MS, Ph.D can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 15-06-2026 through the official JNU website, jnu.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Masters Degree, M.A, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, MS, M.Phil/Ph.D
